message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on dict/list/set operations

Fixed silent data loss in builtins operations:

Lists:
- appendSlice() - silently dropping items on OOM
- insert() - silently failing to insert items on OOM

Dicts:
- keys() - silently dropping keys on OOM
- values() - silently dropping values on OOM
- items() - silently dropping key-value pairs on OOM
- update() - silently failing to copy entries on OOM
- copy() - silently failing to copy entries on OOM
- setdefault() - silently failing to set default on OOM

Sets:
- add() - silently failing to add elements on OOM

list_conversion.zig:
- toList() - silently dropping items on OOM during conversion

All changed from `catch {}` to `catch unreachable`.
